description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist rectangular design. The exterior features a mix of dark and light facades, with large windows arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern on the front and rear. A spacious wooden deck wraps around one side, furnished with outdoor seating, a table, and a large umbrella, suggesting a comfortable outdoor living area. Several trees and shrubs are positioned around the house, enhancing its integration with a suburban or urban neighborhood. The main entryway is set beneath a small overhang, with a simple door and adjacent windows providing natural light. The overall aesthetic is clean and contemporary, with an emphasis on geometric lines and functional outdoor space.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a spacious wooden deck with outdoor furniture. The exterior combines dark and light facades, surrounded by trees and greenery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, large windows, and a furnished wooden deck with an umbrella and seating area.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, minimal window openings, and the presence of trees and outdoor furniture on the deck.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying symmetrical window placement, the deck extending along the side, and additional greenery.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the dark facade, rear door, and the umbrella-covered seating area on the deck.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main door beneath a small overhang, with adjacent windows and a wooden deck leading to the entrance.
